description_long: This is a large, ancient-style ceramic vase with a wide, flat rim and two vertical handles extending from the neck to the shoulder. The body is bulbous and decorated with classical Greco-Roman motifs, including mythological figures and a winged horse, rendered in a red-figure technique against a black background. The rim and base are both broad and slightly flared, with the rim featuring a subtle geometric border. The surface is glossy, indicating a fired and glazed ceramic finish, and the painted scenes are detailed and well-preserved. The handles are robust, allowing for easy lifting, and the interior appears hollow, suitable for holding liquids or decorative items. This vase would be a striking decorative piece in a public or formal urban setting, such as a plaza or museum.
description: A large, glossy ceramic vase with mythological red-figure motifs, wide flat rim, and two sturdy vertical handles. The body features detailed classical artwork and a black-and-red color scheme.
description_view_0: Side view showing one handle and part of the mythological scene, with the wide flat rim and bulbous body visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main mythological motif, including a winged horse and a figure, with both handles visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the other handle and less of the painted scene, focusing on the vase's form.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a less detailed painted area, with the back of the handles and the geometric border on the rim visible.
attribute_pattern: classical mythological scenes with geometric accents
